name: Picnic Potatoes
recipeIngredient: Onion salt and garlic powder to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the frozen hash browns, melted margarine, cream of chicken soup, cheddar cheese, sour cream, onion (if using), salt, pepper, onion salt, and garlic powder together.
2. Transfer the mixture into a greased 13 X 9 or 3 qt. casserole dish.
3. Mix 2 cups of crushed cornflakes with 1/4 cup melted margarine.
4. Spread the cornflake mixture on top of the casserole.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes to 1 hour.
